self_report.numeric_verdict: For a=1,2,3 the integral evaluates to 0.23988, 0.022955, 0.0025366, matching sqrt(pi/a)*exp(-2a) exactly (0.23988, 0.022955, 0.0025366), while the claimed sqrt(pi/a)*exp(-a) gives 0.65205, 0.16962, 0.05095 — off by factor exp(a).
self_report.notes: The standard Putnam 1985 B-5 result is sqrt(pi/a)*exp(-2a); the claim has the exponent halved, confirmed numerically at three values of a.
